text: €9 VPC Router @ umsiteancatia @ ssanans e Every VPC has a VPC Router - Highly available * In every subnet .. ‘'network+1’' address * Routes traffic between subnets e Controlled by ‘route tables’ each subnet has one e AVPC has a Main route table - subnet default
